scenarios.description: Fresh Python CLI with tests but no CI or lockfile.
Python package with deterministic install, tests, and build in pull-request CI.

files..github/workflows/validate.yml:
name: Validate
on: [pull_request]
permissions:
  contents: read
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: python -m pip install -r requirements.lock
      - run: python -m unittest discover -s tests
      - run: python -m build

scenarios.description: Schema and examples exist without operational validation.
